task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing the AHRS_ORIENTATION parameter set to the value 2 (or a parameter edit dialog confirming this value).
Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing the COMPASS_ORIENT parameter set to the value 4.
Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing the COMPASS_EXTERNAL parameter set to the value 1.

task_completion.description: Disable internal compasses by setting COMPASS_USE2 and COMPASS_USE3 to 0
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing both COMPASS_USE2 and COMPASS_USE3 parameters set to the value 0.
Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing the COMPASS_LEARN parameter set to the value 0.

task_completion.description: Configure COMPASS_OFS_X to 85 and COMPASS_OFS_Y to -52
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the QGroundControl Parameters menu showing COMPASS_OFS_X set to 85 and COMPASS_OFS_Y set to -52.

integrity.description: The agent must use the QGroundControl application GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the QGroundControl application window open and being interacted with, specifically in the Vehicle Setup -> Parameters section.

integrity.description: The agent must not simply type the expected answers into a text editor to mock completion.
integrity.visual_evidence: The parameter values must be visible within the QGroundControl interface, not just written in a text file or notes app.

integrity.description: The agent must not use terminal commands/scripts to directly modify underlying parameter files bypassing the GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for genuine interaction with the QGroundControl parameter search and edit dialogs rather than terminal windows executing commands like 'sed' or 'echo' to change configuration files.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct parameter values to be configured in QGroundControl are: AHRS_ORIENTATION = 2, COMPASS_ORIENT = 4, COMPASS_EXTERNAL = 1, COMPASS_USE2 = 0, COMPASS_USE3 = 0, COMPASS_LEARN = 0, COMPASS_OFS_X = 85, COMPASS_OFS_Y = -52.
